/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -O2 -fstack-protector-strong -Wformat -Werror=format-security -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2  -frounding-math -g  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest.so -o libgtest.so CMakeFiles/gtest.dir/src/gtest-all.cc.o  -L/home/jay/simulation_ws/src/bvpvalidator/cmake-build-debug/gtest/gtest/src -Wl,-rpath,/home/jay/simulation_ws/src/bvpvalidator/cmake-build-debug/gtest/gtest/src -lpthread
